goal: Extend image-paste-preview to upload images on send and insert markdown links
sub_tasks: T1: Intercept the send flow — subscribe to HermesProxy.on('beforeSend', async (text) => ...)
T2: If pendingImages is empty, return (let normal send proceed)
T3: Create a FormData, append each pending image blob with key 'files'
T5: On success: collect markdown strings from response, prepend to message text, clear pendingImages, update preview strip
T6: On error: show toast/error, DO NOT clear queue (let user retry)
T7: After upload succeeds, call msgInput.value = '' and trigger input event for auto-resize
guard_focus: Does beforeSend intercept trigger ONLY when pendingImages > 0?
Does it upload via multipart POST?
Is markdown prepended to user text so images appear first?
On error, is queue preserved for retry?
Is there visual feedback during upload (spinner)?
notes: ~50 additional lines. Builds on task-imgpaste-1. Handles the upload + markdown insertion.
